title: DestinationSearchResponse

destinations.description: An array that contains the destination details.

href.description: The path to the call URI that produced the current page of results.

limit.description:
The number of records to show in the current response.

Default: 20

next.description:
The URL to access the next set of results. This field includes a continuation_token. No prev field is returned, but this value is persistent during the session so that you can use it to return to the next page.

This field is not returned if fewer records than specified by the limit field are returned.

total.description: The total number of matches for the search criteria.

description: A type that contains information about the destination search response.
